name: Pasta with Alfredo-Peso Sauce - Bon Appetit
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Capellini or spaghetti, freshly cooked
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop basil, pine nuts and garlic in a processor.
2. With the machine running, gradually add olive oil through the feed tube and process until smooth. Mix in 1/2 cup Parmesan. Transfer to a small jar (Can be prepared up to 4 days ahead. Pour enough olive oil over sauce to cover. Cover and refrigerate).
3. Bring cream to a boil in a heavy medium saucepan. Whisk in pesto.
4. Season the sauce to taste with salt and pepper.
5. Combine pasta, sauce and remaining 1/2 cup Parmesan in a large bowl. Toss to coat the pasta evenly and serve.
